steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The claim needs a quotation showing Mrs. Sommers “becomes engrossed in the decision.” Engrossed means completely absorbed in deliberation about how to spend the money.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice A directly captures it: “occupied her greatly” and “absorbed in speculation and calculation” show her mind fully consumed by the decision. The other three depict shopping scenes or her feelings about the money, not her absorbed thinking. That matches choice A — A is correct.
